questions.question: Why were Peter and John arrested after healing the lame man?
options: For teaching and proclaiming the resurrection
questions.answer: For teaching and proclaiming the resurrection

questions.question: What did the early believers share with one another?
options: Their possessions — no one claimed anything as their own
questions.answer: Their possessions — no one claimed anything as their own

questions.question: The rulers commanded Peter and John not to speak or teach in the name of Jesus, and they agreed to stop.
There is salvation in no one else, for there is no other _____ under heaven given among men, by which we must be saved.
When they had prayed, the place was _____, and they were all filled with the Holy Spirit.
